competitor.name: StackAdapt
competitor.summary: Fast-growing full-funnel DSP investing heavily in AI creative tooling and self-serve mid-market expansion.

kargo.name: Baseline
gaps: Self-serve AI optimization parity vs TTD Kokai / StackAdapt
Retail media graph depth vs Criteo / Amazon

signals.title: StackAdapt launches “AdaptAI Creative Studio” beta
signals.summary: Self-serve generative creative with performance prediction for display and CTV—signals a chance for Kargo to productize format-native generation.
signals.rawExcerpt: AdaptAI Creative Studio lets marketers generate, score, and iterate ad variants with predicted attention and CTR…

signals.title: IAB AdsCon: StackAdapt talk on “Attention-predicted pacing”
signals.summary: Public roadmap language around attention-based pacing overlaps Kargo’s brand-lift / attention positioning.
signals.rawExcerpt: Session abstract: How predicted attention scores can reallocate daily budgets without sacrificing reach goals…

opportunities.title: Ship goal-based AI optimization
opportunities.thesis: Buyers now expect goal → optimize. Creative strength needs a decisioning layer.
opportunities.whyItMatters: TTD / StackAdapt / DV360 are resetting the AI-DSP narrative.
opportunities.move: Closed beta: goal → format/placement optimizer for high-impact units.
opportunities.expectedImpact: Defend budgets shifting to “AI DSP” stories.
recommendedActions: Publish public case proof in 90 days

opportunities.title: Generative studio for Kargo formats
opportunities.thesis: Competitors productize brief → variants → score. Own that loop inside Kargo units.
opportunities.whyItMatters: Creative speed is becoming a buying criterion, not a service add-on.
opportunities.move: Generate format-native variants with predicted attention scoring.
opportunities.expectedImpact: Faster self-serve; lock formats as the generation target.

opportunities.title: Own attention → brand outcomes
opportunities.thesis: DSPs now pitch attention pacing. Clarify Kargo’s public methodology first.
opportunities.whyItMatters: Category language Kargo helped popularize is being commoditized.
opportunities.move: One public method card + sales evidence pack vs DSP attention claims.
opportunities.expectedImpact: Keep attention narrative tied to high-impact proof.

quarterlyMoves.title: AdaptAI Creative Studio beta
quarterlyMoves.oneLiner: Public launch of generative creative with predicted CTR.

quarterlyMoves.title: Attention-predicted pacing talk
quarterlyMoves.oneLiner: IAB session abstract on attention-based budgets.

learnings.title: Generative creative is now a product surface
learnings.lesson: AdaptAI Studio makes “brief → variants → score” a self-serve loop.
learnings.quickWin: Generate variants inside Kargo formats with predicted attention scores.

learnings.title: Attention language is being copied
learnings.lesson: Conference abstracts now pitch attention-based pacing as DSP default.
learnings.quickWin: Publish a short public method card: attention → brand outcomes for high-impact.

llmBrief.summary: StackAdapt: direct DSP. Watch level: focus. 2 public signals. Opportunity score 78/100.
